additional_rules.name: business-logic-in-controller
additional_rules.message: Complex logic in controller — controllers should only validate, delegate, and map. Extract to a service.
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move business logic to an Application service (IXxxService). The controller should call the service and map the result to an ActionResult.

additional_rules.name: dbcontext-in-controller
additional_rules.message: DbContext injected directly into controller — use a repository or service instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Inject an IXxxRepository or IXxxService into the controller. Never let the persistence context cross the Infrastructure boundary into the API layer.

additional_rules.name: entity-in-action-return
additional_rules.message: Persistence entity may be returned from controller action — use a DTO/response model instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Create a XxxResponse record and map the entity to it before returning from the action method.

additional_rules.name: missing-authorize-attribute
additional_rules.message: HTTP method attribute on action — verify the controller or action has [Authorize] unless intentionally public
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add [Authorize] to the controller class or verify [AllowAnonymous] is intentional on this action.

additional_rules.name: missing-async-tracking
additional_rules.message: Synchronous data access or missing AsNoTracking — use async methods and AsNoTracking for read-only queries
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace Find() with FindAsync(). Add AsNoTracking() for read-only queries to avoid change-tracking overhead.

additional_rules.name: console-write-in-production
additional_rules.message: Console.Write* in production code — use ILogger<T> instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Inject ILogger<T> via constructor and replace Console.Write* with _logger.LogInformation(), _logger.LogError(), etc.

additional_rules.name: sync-over-async
additional_rules.message: .Result or .Wait() on async Task — can deadlock in ASP.NET Core context
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use 'await' instead of .Result/.Wait(). Make the containing method async Task<T>.

additional_boundaries.name: Domain must not import Application or Infrastructure
